creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/README.TXT> will benefit from an update. 

Tiers
=====

<https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/>

Tier 1
======

<https://wiki.freebsd.org/arm64> will benefit from an update. 

Lesser tiers
============

Recalling <https://www.freebsd.org/status/report-2020-10-2020-12.html#FreeBSD-Release-Engineering-Team> and the more recent transition to Git, maybe we're simply waiting for the infrastructure to come together for first (or more frequent) builds for some Tier 2 platforms …
